title: SQL LIKE filter vulnerable to wildcard injection
evidence: app.py:90 — uses f"%{author_filter}%" with user-supplied input in LIKE clause; a user passing % or _ characters gets unintended wildcard matching
suggestion: Escape LIKE wildcards in author_filter before interpolation, or use exact match

title: DATABASE module global mutated by test fixture
evidence: test_app.py:15 — test fixture directly reassigns app_module.DATABASE, coupling test isolation to module-level state
suggestion: Use Flask app config or dependency injection for the database path

title: init_db() not called on app startup via import
evidence: app.py:147-149 — init_db() only runs under __main__ guard; importing app (e.g., via gunicorn) skips table creation
suggestion: Call init_db() in a before_first_request hook or app factory

title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: app.py:84-94 — list_books() returns all rows unconditionally with no limit/offset support
suggestion: Add ?limit= and ?offset= query params for large collections (not required by spec)
